summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 comprehensively. All user-facing 'cleaning' terminology has been renamed to 'Machine Part' equivalents across frontend components, and the backend Motoko actor has been updated to use 'machinePart' instead of 'cleaningTool'. A migration module was also added to handle the field rename for existing data.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration from the old 'cleaningTool' field to the new 'machinePart' field, including OldMachine/NewMachine type definitions and a run() migration function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to rename the field in backend/main.mo and update CRUD operations. No migration module or data migration logic was requested.
